title: lantana glandulosissima f. parvifolia
intro: Lantana glandulosissima f. parvifolia, also known as small-leaf lantana or compact lantana, is a shrub-like plant native to South America, characterized by its compact growth habit and small, fragrant flowers. The plant is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include antibacterial, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Lantana glandulosissima f. parvifolia include its potential to reduce fever, soothe skin irritations, and aid in the treatment of respiratory issues. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and topical applications, although more research is needed to confirm its safety and efficacy.
